g.text: Q19: Station throughput — busiest Laugh Floor stations by output
Business question: Which stations carry the most performances, and how much
energy does each generate in total?
Returns: station ID, performance count, total energy generated (MWh), avg per session
Exploits mi:atStation on every PerformanceRecord — surfaces load concentration
across the floor, distinct from Q10's live snapshot (this aggregates history).
